questions.context_sentence: We're here at Mount Huangshan!
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：mount- 本意即为“山，上升”，同源词如 mountain。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们来到了黄山！

questions.context_sentence: The clouds look amazing.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：客老（klaʊ）的，天上云彩客老的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 那些云看起来太棒了。

questions.context_sentence: It feels like a magical place.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：触及 (feel) 到某种像 (like) 的质感。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 感觉像一个神奇的地方。

questions.context_sentence: It feels like a magical place.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：magic (魔法) + -al (形容词后缀)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 感觉像一个神奇的地方。

questions.context_sentence: The trees and rocks look like a part of a painting.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：摇滚乐 (rock) 就像岩石 (rock) 一样坚硬有力。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 树木和岩石看起来像一幅画的一部分。

questions.prompt: We're at a ____ area now. (提示: 休息)
questions.context_sentence: We're at a rest area now.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：测试 (test) 完需要休息 (rest)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们现在在休息区。

questions.context_sentence: We're at a rest area now.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：挨 (eə) 惹 (rɪə)，在这个区域容易惹事。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们现在在休息区。

questions.context_sentence: We're at a rest area now.
questions.hint: 组合词记忆：rest (休息) + area (区域)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们现在在休息区。

questions.prompt: Climbing is hard, but we're ____ good progress.
questions.context_sentence: Climbing is hard, but we're making good progress.
questions.hint: 词组搭配：progress 前面常搭配 make，意为制造了进步。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 攀爬很难，但是我们正在取得良好的进展。

questions.context_sentence: Although the weather is bad, many people here are still in high spirits.
questions.hint: 词根拼接：al (全部) + though (尽管) = 虽然。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 虽然天气不好，但这里许多人仍然兴致很高。

questions.context_sentence: many people here are still in high spirits.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：死盯 (stɪl)，他仍然死盯着。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 这里很多人仍然精神饱满。

questions.context_sentence: many people here are still in high spirits.
questions.hint: 图像记忆：精神 (spirits) 像气球一样飞得很高 (high)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 这里很多人仍然精神饱满。

questions.prompt: I don't think my brother Peter is enjoying the ____ very much. (提示: 经历; 经验)
questions.meaning: n. 经历；经验 v. 经历
questions.context_sentence: I don't think my brother Peter is enjoying the experience very much
questions.hint: 词根词缀：ex- (出) + peri (尝试) + -ence (名词后缀) -> 尝试出来的就是经验。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我不认为我的弟弟彼得很享受这次经历

questions.context_sentence: The sun is shining through the clouds!
questions.hint: 联想记忆：穿过 (through) 树林时要小心。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 阳光穿透云层照耀下来！

questions.context_sentence: I'm so glad we're here at Bright Peak.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：听到 good news，心情很 glad。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我很高兴我们来到了明亮峰。

questions.context_sentence: I'm so glad we're here at Bright Peak.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：在山顶 (peak) 大声说话 (speak)
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我很高兴我们来到了明亮峰。

questions.context_sentence: Everything looks grey
questions.hint: 拼写记忆：英式拼写用 e，美式用 a (gray)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 一切看起来都是灰色的

questions.context_sentence: you can't see much because of the heavy fog.
questions.hint: 词组区别：because of 后接名词，because 后接句子。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 因为雾太大了，你看不清什么。

questions.context_sentence: you can't see much because of the heavy fog.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：青蛙 (frog) 在雾 (fog) 中迷路了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 因为雾太大了，你看不清什么。

questions.prompt: The ____ is very wet. (提示: 地面)
questions.context_sentence: The ground is very wet
questions.hint: 联想记忆：操场是圆的 (round) 建立在地面 (ground) 上。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 地面很湿

questions.context_sentence: The ground is very wet
questions.hint: 联想记忆：渔网 (net) 捞上来总是湿的 (wet)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 地面很湿

questions.prompt: adj. 令人疲倦的；累人的
questions.meaning: adj. 令人疲倦的；累人的
questions.context_sentence: Climbing is tiring!
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：tire (使疲劳) + -ing (令人...的)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 爬山真累！

questions.prompt: they don't ____ tired at all. (提示: 似乎; 好像)
questions.context_sentence: they don't seem tired at all.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：看 (see) 起来似乎 (seem) 是他。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他们看起来一点都不累。

questions.context_sentence: Mount Huangshan is beautiful in the sunlight.
questions.hint: 合成词：sun (太阳) + light (光)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 阳光下的黄山很美。

questions.context_sentence: it feels good to be at the top!
questions.hint: 图像记忆：想象站在金字塔最上方的点 (top)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 站在顶端感觉真好！

questions.context_sentence: Helen Thought
questions.hint: 同源法：think (思考) 的过去式变形直接用作名词。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 海伦的想法

questions.prompt: The ____ feels like a magical place. (提示: 山; 高山)
questions.context_sentence: The mountain feels like a magical place.
questions.hint: 词根记忆：mount- (山) + -ain (名词后缀)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 这座山感觉像一个神奇的地方。

questions.context_sentence: who enjoys the experience more at the start?
questions.hint: 联想记忆：比赛站在起跑线 (start) 时。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 谁在一开始更享受这种体验？

questions.context_sentence: how does Peter feel at the end?
questions.hint: 联想记忆：发送 (send) 消息结束 (end) 聊天。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 彼得最后感觉怎么样？

questions.prompt: how does Peter feel ____ ____ ____? (提示: 最后; 在末尾)
questions.context_sentence: how does Peter feel at the end?
questions.hint: 词组对比：at the end 强调具体位置或时间的末点。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 彼得最后感觉怎么样？

questions.context_sentence: There is a huge storm today.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：石头 (sto) 满 (m) 天飞，这就是风暴。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 今天有一场很大的暴风雨。

questions.prompt: The rain is ____ down. (提示: 倾倒; 倒出)
questions.context_sentence: The rain is pouring down.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：泼 (pour) 水。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 雨下得很大。

questions.context_sentence: The wind is blowing hard too.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：风 (wind) 从窗户 (window) 吹进来。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 风也刮得很大。

questions.prompt: He is ____ and running after his hat! (提示: 喊叫; 呼唤)
questions.context_sentence: He is shouting and running after his hat!
questions.hint: 联想记忆：向外 (out) 大喊 (shout)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他正在喊叫着追他的帽子！

questions.context_sentence: He is shouting and running after his hat!
questions.hint: 动作联想：跑到某人后面 (after) 就是在追逐他。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他正在喊叫着追他的帽子！

questions.meaning: 不论是雨或是晴；不管发生什么事
questions.context_sentence: Enjoy your day, come rain or shine.
questions.hint: 字面翻译：下雨 (rain) 还是天晴 (shine)，也就是风雨无阻。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 祝你今天愉快，无论晴雨。

questions.prompt: How does the weather ____ us? (提示: 影响)
questions.context_sentence: How does the weather affect us?
questions.hint: 前缀记忆：af- (表强调) + fect (做) -> 施加作用去影响。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 天气是如何影响我们的？

questions.context_sentence: In the north, it's warm and dry.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：尝试 (try) 保持干燥 (dry)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 在北方，天气温暖干燥。

questions.context_sentence: Oh! And now there's lightning!
questions.hint: 词根记忆：light (光) + ning -> 像光一样闪过的现象。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 哦！现在又打雷了！

questions.prompt: In the north, it's ____. (提示: 有暴风雨 (或暴风雪))
questions.meaning: adj. 有暴风雨 (或暴风雪)
questions.context_sentence: In the north, it's stormy.
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：storm (风暴) + -y (形容词后缀)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 在北方，天气是暴风雨。

questions.context_sentence: The temperature is around 20°C.
questions.hint: 词根联系：temper(脾气)随着温度(temperature)的升高而变大。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 温度在20摄氏度左右。

questions.prompt: now we're building a ____ outside. (提示: 雪人)
questions.context_sentence: now we're building a snowman outside.
questions.hint: 合成词：snow (雪) + man (人)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 现在我们在外面堆雪人。

questions.context_sentence: It's raining heavily.
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：heavy (重的) 变 y 为 i + -ly 副词后缀。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 正在下大雨。

questions.context_sentence: It's cold and snowy.
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：snow (雪) + -y (有...特性的)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 天气寒冷，而且下雪了。

questions.context_sentence: It is freezing.
questions.hint: 词缀拓展：freeze (结冰) 去 e 加 -ing。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 太冷了。

questions.prompt: if we are feeling ill, we say we are "____ ____ ____".
questions.context_sentence: if we are feeling ill, we say we are "under the weather".
questions.hint: 画面联想：被天气 (weather) 压在下面 (under)，引申为身体抱恙。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 如果我们感觉不舒服，我们会说我们“under the weather”（身体不适）。

questions.context_sentence: If we are feeling stressed and busy, we can say that we are "snowed under".
questions.hint: 画面联想：被厚厚的雪 (snow) 埋没 (under) 了，比喻工作多得做不完。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 如果我们感到压力很大而且很忙，我们可以说我们“忙不过来”。

questions.context_sentence: to brighten up : to become happier
questions.hint: 直译引申：天气转晴变亮，人的心情也开朗起来。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 使...高兴起来：变得更快乐

questions.prompt: to be ____ ____ ____ : to be extremely happy and excited
questions.meaning: 极度快乐；高兴得飘飘然
questions.context_sentence: to be on cloud nine : to be extremely happy and excited
questions.hint: 俗语联想：高兴得仿佛飞到了九重天上的云朵 (cloud nine) 里。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: to be on cloud nine：极其快乐和兴奋

questions.context_sentence: to be in a fog : to be confused
questions.hint: 画面联想：如同置身于大雾 (fog) 之中，看不清方向。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 感到困惑：感到迷惑
